arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Liverpool – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur host Liverpool in the first leg of their Carabao Cup semi-final tie this evening. Ange Postecoglou boldly declared earlier this season that he ‘usually’ wins silverware in his second season and Spurs can take a step closer to breaking their trophy drought tonight. arts.ttl: Liverpool pick Osimhen as Nunez REPLACEMENT
arts.sum: Liverpool have pinpointed Nigeria international striker Victor Osimhen, who is currently on loan at Galatasaray from Napoli, as a replacement for Darwin Nunez at Anfield. Anfield Watch has exclusively revealed that Liverpool really admire Victor Osimhen and Edwards and Hughes both view him as the ideal replacement for Nunez.

arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Liverpool – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Tottenham host Carabao Cup holders Liverpool on Wednesday night in the first leg of their Carabao Cup semi-final. In the last round, Ange Postecoglou’s outfit were on the positive side of a 4-3 thriller against Manchester United to advance into the last four. arts.ttl: Tottenham and West Ham ‘in discussions’ over unusual transfer – Agent working on solution
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur and West Ham United are in the picture to sign AC Omonia’s Senou Coulibaly. That’s according to Africa Foot, who state the Premier League duo are joined by Fiorentina in the transfer chase.
